findings.name: Salesforce
findings.notes: Free Developer Edition org; OAuth setup is heavy.

findings.name: HubSpot
findings.one_liner: CRM, marketing, sales and service hub.
findings.notes: Free dev account; private-app tokens or OAuth.

findings.name: Pipedrive
findings.notes: API token per user or OAuth app.

findings.name: Attio
findings.notes: Bearer access token; OAuth for multi-workspace apps.

findings.name: Twenty
findings.notes: Open-source; API-key bearer. Not a stock Composio toolkit.

findings.name: Close
findings.notes: Paid product with trial; API key or OAuth.

findings.name: DealCloud
findings.one_liner: Intapp DealCloud CRM/DealFlow for capital markets.
findings.blocker: Enterprise instance; admin must provision API credentials.

findings.name: Zendesk
findings.notes: Free trial; API token or OAuth.

findings.name: Freshdesk
findings.notes: API key used as Basic username.

findings.name: Pylon
findings.notes: Paid product; API key from settings.

findings.name: Gladly
findings.blocker: Enterprise onboarding; API token provisioned by admin, no self-serve.

findings.name: Twilio
findings.notes: Account SID + auth token / API keys; trial credit.

findings.name: Zoho Cliq
findings.one_liner: Team chat in the Zoho suite.
findings.notes: OAuth2 like the rest of Zoho.

findings.name: Pumble
findings.blocker: API is newer and narrower than Slack's.

findings.name: Telegram
findings.one_liner: Messaging app with an open Bot API.
findings.notes: Bot token from BotFather; no signup gate.

findings.name: WhatsApp Business
findings.one_liner: Business messaging via Meta Cloud API.
findings.blocker: Meta business verification + app review; phone-number registration.
findings.notes: Cloud API tokens after Meta review.

findings.name: Vonage
findings.notes: API key/secret + JWT for voice; trial credit.

findings.name: Google Ads
findings.blocker: Developer token must be approved for Basic/Standard access.

findings.name: Meta Ads
findings.blocker: App review + business verification for ads permissions.

findings.name: LinkedIn Ads
findings.blocker: Marketing Developer Program application/approval required.

findings.name: GoHighLevel
findings.notes: v2 OAuth2 (v1 API keys deprecated); paid agency SaaS.

findings.name: Mailchimp
findings.notes: API key or OAuth; free tier.

findings.name: systeme.io
findings.notes: Free plan issues an API key.

findings.name: Pinterest
findings.blocker: App/trial-access review before standard/production access.

findings.name: Threads (Meta)
findings.blocker: Meta app setup + permission review; narrow surface.

findings.name: Shopify
findings.notes: Free dev store; Admin API access token.

findings.name: WooCommerce
findings.notes: Consumer key/secret; needs a WP host.

findings.name: BigCommerce
findings.notes: Store API account tokens; free sandbox.

findings.name: Salesforce Commerce Cloud
findings.blocker: Requires a paid CC instance / partner sandbox; SLAS setup.

findings.name: Magento (Adobe Commerce)
findings.notes: Self-host OSS free; Adobe Commerce paid.

findings.name: Squarespace
findings.blocker: Commerce APIs need a paid Commerce plan.

findings.name: Amazon Selling Partner
findings.blocker: SP-API developer registration + app approval (some restricted roles).

findings.name: fanbasis
findings.blocker: v3 docs are login-gated; public checkout API + webhooks (HMAC).
findings.notes: Verified via public API reference; some docs gated.

findings.name: SE Ranking
findings.blocker: API access is a paid add-on / credits.

findings.name: Ahrefs
findings.blocker: API billed in units; needs paid subscription.

findings.name: Firecrawl
findings.notes: API key; free tier + official MCP.

findings.name: Bright Data
findings.blocker: KYC/compliance review for some scraping products.
findings.notes: Proxy creds + API tokens; MCP available.

findings.name: Sherlock
findings.one_liner: OSS: hunt usernames across social networks.
findings.blocker: No web API — it's a local CLI/library; must be wrapped as a tool.

findings.name: Waterfall.io
findings.notes: x-api-key header; usage-based, key on signup.

findings.name: Clay
findings.blocker: No true public REST API; real lookup API is Enterprise-gated; webhook-oriented.
findings.notes: Newer CLI/public API emerging but limited.

findings.name: GitHub
findings.notes: PAT or OAuth/GitHub App; official MCP.

findings.name: Neo4j
findings.notes: Aura free tier; Aura API for provisioning.

findings.name: Notion
findings.notes: Internal integration token or OAuth; MCP.

findings.name: Linear
findings.notes: API key or OAuth; official MCP.

findings.name: Jira
findings.notes: API token (Basic) or 3LO OAuth; Atlassian MCP.

findings.name: Stripe
findings.notes: Test-mode keys instantly; OAuth for Connect; MCP.

findings.name: Plaid
findings.blocker: Production access needs a review; Sandbox is self-serve free.

findings.name: Binance
findings.blocker: Regional/KYC restrictions on some accounts.

findings.name: Paygent Connect
findings.blocker: Merchant/gateway account provisioned via reseller; no self-serve.
findings.notes: No distinct 'Paygent Connect' docs found; maps to NMI.

findings.name: iPayX
findings.blocker: No public developer docs found at ipayx.ai; could not verify auth or API.
findings.notes: DEFEATED US: name collides with many 'iPay' vendors; no clear docs.

findings.name: Brex
findings.blocker: Requires a Brex customer account (free) to mint keys.

findings.name: Ramp
findings.blocker: Requires a Ramp customer account to create API client.

findings.name: PitchBook
findings.blocker: Standalone paid contract + credits via account manager; MCP connector is SSO-gated.

findings.name: NotebookLM
findings.blocker: API is Gemini Enterprise-only (Standard/Plus); no consumer/self-serve API.

findings.name: Otter AI
findings.blocker: Public API is Enterprise beta (via account manager); no self-serve key. MCP is OAuth.

findings.name: Fathom
findings.notes: Self-serve API key; OAuth for partner apps.

findings.name: Consensus
findings.blocker: API by application only (~$0.10/call + platform fee); MCP uses OAuth.
findings.notes: Apply for credentials; MCP self-serve via OAuth.

findings.name: Devin
findings.blocker: Requires a paid Devin plan; API keys are then self-serve.

findings.name: higgsfield
findings.notes: Key+secret via dashboard; CLI uses browser OAuth.

findings.name: Mermaid CLI
findings.one_liner: OSS: render Mermaid diagrams to images.
findings.blocker: No web API — local CLI/library; wrap as a tool/skill.
